mapper.select: SELECT id, membership_tier_id, role_id, email, password, username, birth_date, cellphone, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, membership_tier_id, role_id, email, password, username, birth_date, cellphone, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at FROM [dbo].[users]
username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(id) FROM [dbo].[users]
username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT id, membership_tier_id, role_id, email, password, username, birth_date, cellphone, status, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE id = #{id}
